impact: This gives the PP&D fixture set a deterministic bridge from a required user fact to a reversible DevHub draft-fill preview, with source evidence and safety checks before any live browser automation.
summary: Add a redacted fixture and validation test for one PP&D missing-information to mocked DevHub form-field draft-preview mapping.
target_task: Task checkbox-78: Task checkbox-73: Add a missing-information to form-field mapping fixture that links one required PP&D user fact to one mocked DevHub field, one source evidence ID, and one reversible draft-preview action.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
